summary: Prashnakosh RC1 Wing Blocker Fix - All features verified. Settings link added to sidebar, wing management UI working, teacher/HOD creation with wing selection working, auto-seeding of wings on school creation fixed.

minor.issue: Auto-seeding of wings was silently failing due to missing isActive field. Fixed by adding isActive: true to default wings.

issues: MVMCHN school was marked as inactive (active: false), causing it to not appear in school dropdown. Activated via API.

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Auto-seeding of wings on school creation now includes isActive: true and logging for debugging
The school dropdown in Users page filters by active !== false, so inactive schools won't appear
updated_files: /app/server/routes.ts - Added isActive: true to default wings and logging for auto-seeding
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wing RC1 features fully tested. Settings link in sidebar works. Wing management at /superadmin/settings shows 4 wings per school. Teacher/HOD creation requires wing selection. Auto-seeding of wings on school creation now works after fix.

settings_sidebar_link.description: Settings link visible in sidebar for super_admin role, navigates to /superadmin/settings

settings_wing_management.description: Wing management UI shows all 4 wings (Primary, Middle, Secondary, Senior Secondary) with edit/delete buttons

users_wing_selector.description: Wing dropdown appears when Teacher or HOD role is selected in Add User form

users_subjects_selector.description: Subjects checkboxes appear for Teacher role with common subjects list

api_teacher_creation_with_wing.description: POST /api/superadmin/users with role=teacher requires wingId and subjects

api_teacher_validation.description: Creating teacher without wing or subjects returns 400 error

api_school_auto_seed_wings.description: POST /api/superadmin/schools now auto-seeds 4 default wings (after fix)

fix_applied.description: Added isActive: true to default wings array and added console logging for debugging auto-seeding
